html:
The Log Suit is a wearable Armor, crafted in the Fight Tab. It requires 8 Logs and 2 Ropes to craft and a Science Machine to prototype.

It has 450 durability and absorbs 80% of physical damage. It can also be added to a Campfire or Fire Pit for fuel, even when its durability is nearly gone. Not considering its durability, the log suit effectively adds 600 to a survivor with 150 .

Downloadable Content

In the Reign of Giants (RoG) and Shipwrecked (SW) DLCs, the Log Suit can be used as a crafting ingredient to obtain better armor. It is an ingredient for Scalemail (RoG) and Obsidian Armor (SW), both of which provide protection against fire, as well as Cactus Armor (SW) which damages attackers.

Tips

  • If the player is in a place with infinite darkness such as the Caves, the player can equip a Log Suit for protection and a Miner Hat or Moggles to safely fight enemies.
  • When paired with the Football Helmet, it will absorb 96% of incoming damage. It is best to put it on last because of the damage calculation of armor and since it is easily renewable. This does not work in Don't Starve Together due to the damage calculation of armor being changed.

Trivia

  • The Log Suit was originally prototyped with the Alchemy Engine.
  • A Character wearing the Log Suit makes slight clicking noises while running.

Assets

  • Dropped
  • Equipped

Gallery

  • Log Suit in early beta
  • In official game screenshots from early builds of the game Shop
  • In early builds of the game

–Wurt
“Trees are pretty useful.”
–Walter
“Good enough for now.”
–Wanda

Tóm tắt

Log Suit là một loại Áo giáp có thể đeo được, được chế tạo trong Thẻ Chiến đấu. Nó cần 8 Gỗ và 2 Dây Thừng để chế tạo và Máy Khoa Học để tạo nguyên mẫu.

The '''Log Suit''' is a wearable [[Armor]], crafted in the [[Fight Tab]]. It requires 8 [[Log]]s and 2 [[Rope]]s to craft and a [[Science Machine]] to prototype.

It has 450 durability and absorbs 80% of physical damage. It can also be added to a [[Campfire]] or [[Fire Pit]] for [[fuel]], even when its durability is nearly gone. Not considering its durability, the log suit effectively adds 600 {{Hp}} to a survivor with 150 {{Hp}}.
__NOTOC__
== {{Pic32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content ==
In the ''[[Reign of Giants]]'' (RoG) and ''[[Shipwrecked]]'' (SW) DLCs, the Log Suit can be used as a crafting ingredient to obtain better armor. It is an ingredient for [[Scalemail]] (RoG) and [[Obsidian Armor]] (SW), both of which provide protection against [[fire]], as well as [[Cactus Armor]] (SW) which damages attackers.

== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* If the player is in a place with infinite darkness such as the Caves, the player can equip a Log Suit for protection and a [[Miner Hat]] or [[Moggles]] to safely fight enemies.
* When paired with the [[Football Helmet]], it will absorb 96% of incoming damage. It is best to put it on last because of the [[Armor#Calculations|damage calculation of armor]] and since it is easily renewable. This does not work in ''Don't Starve Together'' due to the damage calculation of armor being changed.

}}

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Log Suit was originally prototyped with the [[Alchemy Engine]].
* A [[Character]] wearing the Log Suit makes slight clicking noises while running.
